title: Nordtical Theme
description: An arctic, north-bluish color UI-Pack for Minecraft based on the Nord colour scheme. ⛏️
body:
## About
Nord UI is a Minecraft resource pack that is based on the Nord colour theme and focuses on theming Minecraft GUI. The Nord theme consists of 3 main beautiful pastel colour palettes consisting of Snow Storm , Frost and Polar Night. Read more about Nord [here](https://www.nordtheme.com/).



















![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3980bbcc0e5681e5f05ed2bb6ba7f3a4e4cd6f18.png)



![ex1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd99b6d7aabdd066a1ed44bbb823958a46904d40.png)



![ex2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30e276544bc9271b04989a754007f21f719b3140.png)























## Why should you use this pack?
- Compatibility: All Minecraft versions from 1.6.1 to the latest (currently 1.21.5) are supported. Also, many mods are supported.
- It's not just a resource pack: Nord theme is available for many programs and sites. [See All of Nord ports here](https://www.nordtheme.com/ports)
